song.title: Moment By Moment
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Dying with Jesus, By death reckon’d mine; Living with Jesus a new life divine; Looking to Jesus till glory does shine, Moment by moment, O Lord, I am Thine.
[C] Chorus Moment by moment I’m kept in His love, Moment by moment I’ve life from above; Looking to Jesus till glory does shine; Moment by moment, O Lord, I am Thine.
[V2] 2) Never a battle with wrong for the right, Never a contest that He does not fight; Lifting above us His banner so bright; Moment by moment I’m kept in His sight.
[V3] 3) Never a trial that He is not there, Never a burden that He does not bear; Never a sorrow that He does not share, Moment by moment, I’m under His care.
[V4] 4) Never a heartache, and never a groan, Never a teardrop and never a moan; Never a danger but there on the throne Moment by moment He thinks of His own.
[V5] 5) Never a weakness that He does not feel, Never a sickness that He cannot heal; Moment by moment, in woe or in weal, Jesus, my Savior, abides with me still.
song.author: Daniel W. Whittle, May Whittle Moody
